import re, unicodedata

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    # unify Arabic letters
    t = text
    # remove tashkeel (harakat)
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    t = arabic_diacritics.sub('', t)
    # remove tatweel
    t = t.replace('\u0640', '')
    # normalize alef forms
    t = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625]', 'ا', t)
    t = t.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    # normalize yaa and dotless alef maqsura
    t = t.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # normalize ta marbuta
    t = t.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # normalize hamza on waw/yaa -> hamza standalone? We'll unify to ء? Or remove hamza marks?
    # We'll replace ؤ, ئ to ء for search or remove hamza completely
    t = t.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9\s]', ' ', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip().lower()
    return t

span_full = "أُذِنَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَتَزَيَّنَ بِزِينَتَيْنِ: سِرْبَالًا يُقَمَّصُ بِهِ، وَمَرْكَبًا يُلْجَمُ بِهِ"
span_full_norm = normalize_ar(span_full)
span_full_norm

# Build searchable text field in hadith dataset

# Build index (list of tuples rec, normalized text)

for rec in hadith_data:
    txt = get_text(rec)
    hadith_norm.append((rec, normalize_ar(txt)))

# direct substring search normalized

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

span_full_norm = normalize_ar(span_full)
# Compute top 20 candidates by similarity
sims = []
for rec, norm in hadith_norm:
    r = sim_ratio(span_full_norm, norm)
    if r > 0.4:  # initial filter
        sims.append((r, rec, norm))
sims_sorted = sorted(sims, key=lambda x: -x[0])
len(sims_sorted), sims_sorted[:5][0][0] if sims_sorted else None
